---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us identify and fix software bugs.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Code Snippets

If applicable, add screenshots or paste command line outputs/logs to help explain the problem.

## Environment Details

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Ubuntu]
- Shell / Runtime Version: [e.g. zsh 5.9, node 20]
- Agent Autonomy Level (if applicable): [e.g. L2]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
